description: Registry of recognized non-native DeFi/NFT programs. Programs listed here are known to the classifier and will NOT trigger the unknown-program-writable REJECT path. Each entry includes the discriminator scheme used by that program. Per-instruction safe entries list clearly-benign user instructions (safeInstructions) that produce INFO findings (no escalation). Per-instruction danger entries list specific instructions that are dangerous and their severity. Any instruction NOT listed as safe or dangerous on a recognized program yields a HOLD (never SIGN).

programs.name: Metaplex Token Metadata
programs.description: Metaplex Token Metadata program. Manages NFT/token metadata, creators, and on-chain authority.

dangerousInstructions.label: Metaplex: Transfer NFT
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Transfers ownership of an NFT from the signer to an attacker-controlled wallet — direct NFT theft.

dangerousInstructions.label: Metaplex: Delegate NFT authority
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Grants a delegate authority over the NFT (transfer, burn, lock, etc.). A malicious delegate can steal or burn the NFT after signing.

dangerousInstructions.label: Metaplex: Revoke NFT delegate
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Revokes a delegate authority. Low risk on its own but part of authority-management flows; verify the target account.

dangerousInstructions.label: Metaplex: Burn NFT (pNFT)
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Burns a programmable NFT (pNFT), permanently destroying it.

dangerousInstructions.label: Metaplex: BurnNft (legacy)
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Burns a legacy NFT token, permanently destroying it.

dangerousInstructions.label: Metaplex: Update metadata
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Updates on-chain metadata (name, URI, creators, seller fee). An attacker can change the NFT URI to point to malicious content or alter royalty splits.

dangerousInstructions.label: Metaplex: UpdateMetadataAccount
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Legacy UpdateMetadataAccount — changes on-chain NFT metadata URI/name/symbol.

dangerousInstructions.label: Metaplex: UpdateMetadataAccountV2
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Updates metadata using v2 schema (adds creators/uses/collection fields).

programs.name: Metaplex Bubblegum (cNFT)
programs.description: Metaplex Bubblegum program for compressed NFTs (cNFTs). Uses Anchor 8-byte discriminators.

dangerousInstructions.label: Bubblegum: Transfer cNFT
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Transfers ownership of a compressed NFT to the destination wallet — direct cNFT theft if attacker is destination.

dangerousInstructions.label: Bubblegum: Transfer cNFT v2
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: V2 transfer of a compressed NFT — same theft risk as Transfer.

dangerousInstructions.label: Bubblegum: Delegate cNFT authority
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Grants a delegate authority over the cNFT. A malicious delegate can steal or burn the cNFT.

dangerousInstructions.label: Bubblegum: Delegate cNFT authority v2
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: V2 delegate for cNFT — same risk as Delegate.

dangerousInstructions.label: Bubblegum: Delegate and freeze cNFT v2
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Delegates and freezes the cNFT simultaneously, preventing further transfers until thawed.

dangerousInstructions.label: Bubblegum: Burn cNFT
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Burns (permanently destroys) a compressed NFT.

dangerousInstructions.label: Bubblegum: Burn cNFT v2
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: V2 burn of a compressed NFT — permanent destruction.

programs.name: Jupiter Aggregator v6
programs.description: Jupiter v6 swap aggregator. Safe swap/route instructions produce INFO; setTokenLedger decouples amount from quote and is HOLD. Discriminators for the closed-source route family are from @jup-ag/instruction-parser published artifacts and sha256 cross-checked.

dangerousInstructions.label: Jupiter v6: setTokenLedger
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Decouples the swap amount from the quoted amount. Can be used to execute a swap with a different amount than quoted, enabling front-running or amount manipulation.

programs.name: Orca Whirlpools
programs.description: Orca Whirlpools concentrated-liquidity AMM. Safe instructions include swap, liquidity operations, and position management. Authority instructions are HOLD.

dangerousInstructions.label: Orca Whirlpools: setFeeAuthority
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Changes the fee authority of a Whirlpool, potentially allowing protocol fee extraction or configuration changes by a new authority.

dangerousInstructions.label: Orca Whirlpools: setCollectProtocolFeesAuthority
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Changes who can collect protocol fees from the pool.

dangerousInstructions.label: Orca Whirlpools: collectProtocolFees
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Withdraws accumulated protocol fees from the pool. User should not be doing this; only expected for the protocol operator.

dangerousInstructions.label: Orca Whirlpools: setDefaultFeeRate
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Changes the default fee rate for new pools created in the Whirlpool config. Should only be called by the Whirlpool authority.

programs.name: Raydium AMM v4
programs.description: Raydium AMM v4 liquidity program. All instructions default to HOLD.

programs.name: Pump.fun
programs.description: Pump.fun bonding curve program. buy/sell/create are normal user operations. Admin parameter changes are dangerous.

dangerousInstructions.label: Pump.fun: setParams (admin config change)
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Changes global bonding curve parameters. Only the protocol admin should call this; a user signing this instruction is unexpected.

dangerousInstructions.label: Pump.fun: setCreator (admin override)
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Overrides the bonding curve creator, redirecting creator fees. Can be used to steal creator fees from the legitimate creator.

dangerousInstructions.label: Pump.fun: updateGlobalAuthority (admin)
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Transfers the global authority of the Pump.fun protocol to a new address. This is a critical admin operation that would give full control of the protocol.

programs.name: Pump AMM (PumpSwap)
programs.description: Pump.fun AMM (PumpSwap) — Raydium-CPMM fork for graduated pump.fun tokens. buy/sell/deposit/withdraw are normal user operations. Admin instructions are dangerous.

dangerousInstructions.label: Pump AMM: updateAdmin
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Changes the protocol admin address. Only the current admin should sign this; a user signing it is highly suspicious.

dangerousInstructions.label: Pump AMM: updateFeeConfig
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Changes fee parameters for the AMM. Admin-only operation; user signing is unexpected.

dangerousInstructions.label: Pump AMM: setCoinCreator
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Overrides the coin creator for a pool, redirecting creator fee receipts.

dangerousInstructions.label: Pump AMM: disable (halt pool)
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Disables a pool, preventing all swaps. Admin-only; a user signing this would lock user funds.

programs.name: Raydium CLMM
programs.description: Raydium Concentrated Liquidity Market Maker. Swap, position management, and liquidity operations are safe user operations. Protocol admin instructions are dangerous.

dangerousInstructions.label: Raydium CLMM: updateAmmConfig (admin)
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Changes AMM configuration parameters. Admin-only; user signing is unexpected.

dangerousInstructions.label: Raydium CLMM: updatePoolStatus (admin)
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Changes pool operational status. Admin-only; can be used to halt or restrict pool operations.

dangerousInstructions.label: Raydium CLMM: transferRewardOwner
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Transfers reward authority to a new address. Can redirect reward emissions.

dangerousInstructions.label: Raydium CLMM: collectProtocolFee
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Collects accumulated protocol fees from the pool. Should only be called by the protocol operator, not a regular user.

dangerousInstructions.label: Raydium CLMM: collectFundFee
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Collects accumulated fund fees from the pool. Should only be called by the protocol operator.

programs.name: Raydium CPMM
programs.description: Raydium Constant Product Market Maker (CPMM). Swap and liquidity operations are safe user operations. Protocol admin instructions are dangerous.

dangerousInstructions.label: Raydium CPMM: updateAmmConfig (admin)
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Changes AMM configuration parameters. Admin-only; user signing is unexpected.

dangerousInstructions.label: Raydium CPMM: updatePoolStatus (admin)
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Changes pool operational status. Admin-only; can be used to halt pool operations.

dangerousInstructions.label: Raydium CPMM: collectProtocolFee
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Collects accumulated protocol fees. Should only be called by the protocol operator.

dangerousInstructions.label: Raydium CPMM: collectFundFee
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Collects accumulated fund fees. Should only be called by the protocol operator.

dangerousInstructions.label: Raydium CPMM: collectCreatorFee
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Collects creator fees. Should be called by the pool creator, not arbitrary users.

programs.name: Drift Protocol
programs.description: Drift Protocol v2 perpetuals and spot trading. Order placement, deposits, and PnL operations are safe user operations. Admin instructions are REJECT or HOLD.

dangerousInstructions.label: Drift: updateAdmin (protocol ownership transfer)
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Transfers the Drift protocol admin address to a new key. This is a critical admin operation that would give full control of the protocol state.

dangerousInstructions.label: Drift: updateUserDelegate
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Sets a delegate that can trade on behalf of the user account. A malicious delegate can open leveraged positions, drain collateral, or force liquidation.

dangerousInstructions.label: Drift: deleteUser
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Deletes a Drift user account. Verify this is the intended account before signing.

dangerousInstructions.label: Drift: adminDeposit
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Admin-only deposit operation. A regular user should not be signing this.

dangerousInstructions.label: Drift: adminWithdrawFromInsuranceFundVault
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Withdraws from the Drift insurance fund. Admin-only; user signing is highly suspicious.

programs.name: Kamino Lending (klend)
programs.description: Kamino Finance lending protocol. Deposit, borrow, repay, and refresh operations are safe user operations. Admin instructions that change market ownership or global config are REJECT.

dangerousInstructions.label: Kamino Lending: updateLendingMarketOwner (ownership transfer)
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Transfers ownership of a lending market to a new address. This is a critical admin operation giving full control of the market.

dangerousInstructions.label: Kamino Lending: updateGlobalConfigAdmin (admin transfer)
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Changes the global config admin for the entire Kamino lending protocol. Critical admin operation.

dangerousInstructions.label: Kamino Lending: updateReserveConfig
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Changes reserve configuration parameters (LTV, liquidation threshold, fees, etc.). Admin-only; a user signing this could manipulate risk parameters.

dangerousInstructions.label: Kamino Lending: withdrawProtocolFee
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Withdraws accumulated protocol fees. Should only be called by the protocol operator.

dangerousInstructions.label: Kamino Lending: socializeLoss
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Socializes bad debt across all lenders in a reserve. This reduces the value of all lenders' positions and should only be an emergency admin operation.

programs.name: Meteora DLMM
programs.description: Meteora Dynamic Liquidity Market Maker. Swap, liquidity add/remove, and fee claiming are safe user operations. Protocol admin instructions are dangerous.

dangerousInstructions.label: Meteora DLMM: withdrawProtocolFee
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Withdraws accumulated protocol fees. Should only be called by the protocol fee owner.

dangerousInstructions.label: Meteora DLMM: updateRewardFunder
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Changes who can fund rewards for the pool. Admin-only operation.

dangerousInstructions.label: Meteora DLMM: setPairStatus
dangerousInstructions.mapsToLoss: Changes the status of a DLMM pair (enable/disable). Admin-only; can freeze user funds in the pool.
